title: Technical Architecture & Build Plan
summary: Technical companion to PRD — architecture overview, DB schema, theme implementation, 7-day build plan, deployment, package choices.

architecture.paradigm: Flat MVC monorepo with npm workspaces

build_plan: 7-day sprint: Day 1 Scaffold, Day 2 Models+Admin, Day 3 Public API, Day 4 Next.js Foundation, Day 5 Frontend Pages, Day 6 Contact+Polish, Day 7 Deploy Prep
